author: audit-agent

patch.value: pm extension --init or pm extension --scaffold should generate a starter extension with manifest.json, index.ts, and example registration. This would dramatically improve the extension authoring experience.
Add extension project scaffold command or template
No extension template or scaffold exists. Extension authors must read docs and bundled extensions to understand the structure.
pm extension --init creates a working starter extension with manifest, entry point, and example capability.

message: Found during 2026-04-26 dogfood audit - no extension scaffold
